entity.summary: Native non-custodial decentralized exchange on GalaChain providing token swaps, concentrated-liquidity pools, liquidity-provider fee earning, market exploration, portfolio tracking, and wallet-signed on-chain settlement.
entity.notes: Current first-party GalaSwap application identifies itself as the native GalaChain DEX and documents self-custodial swaps, concentrated-liquidity pools, LP fees, market tracking, portfolio history, wallet-signed settlement, and supported assets. DefiLlama independently reports current GalaChain TVL, fees, and DEX volume.

evidence.title: GalaSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party GalaSwap application identifies the product as a decentralized exchange built natively on GalaChain and documents token swaps, concentrated-liquidity provision, market tracking, portfolio management, and wallet-signed on-chain settlement.

evidence.title: Gala Swap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Gala Swap as a GalaChain CLMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, and DEX volume.

evidence.title: Gala Swap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Gala Swap under the Gala ecosystem and corroborates the first-party DEX identity.
